data.title: Bitcoin surges above $78,000. Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely. Warsh battles Senate. Kalshi and Polymarket enter perpetual futures.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin has surged over $78,000. Kevin Warsh engaged in a confrontation with the Senate. Kalshi and Polymarket are set to compete in the realm of perpetual futures.

data.title: Volatus Aerospace adds Major General (Ret’d) Peter Fesler to Advisory Board; Lieutenant-General (Ret’d) Andrew Leslie named Chair.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global e-commerce market is expected to reach $6.5 trillion by 2023, showing significant growth from the current value of $3.5 trillion. The Asia-Pacific region is leading this growth, with China accounting for the largest share of the market at $2.8 trillion. Mobile commerce is also on the rise, with global m-commerce sales projected to reach $3.5 trillion by 2021. North America and Europe are the other two key regions driving the growth of e-commerce, with sales expected to reach $1.4 trillion and $1.3 trillion, respectively, by 2023. The report also highlights the increasing trend of consumers shifting towards online shopping, driven by factors such as convenience, variety, and competitive pricing. These insights suggest a promising future for the e-commerce industry on a global scale.

data.title: 8 in 10 Employees Say They Need AI Training -- After Their Companies Already Rolled Out the Tools
data.description: As AI becomes increasingly prevalent in workplaces, both employees and hiring managers acknowledge that the primary issue lies not within the technology itself, but in the realm of training. In a recent survey conducted in Oklahoma City on April 22, 2026, it was found that artificial intelligence is transforming the nature of tasks in workplaces. However, a significant number of employees express that they have been provided with AI tools without the necessary guidance or education. This highlights a gap in training, with many individuals feeling ill-prepared to effectively utilize AI in their roles.

data.title: Sanofi Eyes First On-Body Injector Cancer Therapy As FDA Delays Decision
data.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) recently announced a delay in its decision regarding Sanofi SA's subcutaneous Sarclisa formulation, extending the review timeline by up to three months. The FDA's target action date for the biologics license application for Sarclisa SC is now set for July 23. This application seeks approval for Sarclisa SC to be used in combination with standard-of-care regimens for multiple myeloma patients across all current U.S. indications of the intravenous version. If approved, Sarclisa SC could potentially be the first anticancer treatment administered via an on-body injector, offering a more convenient delivery method. Additionally, the FDA broadened the eligible patient population for Tzield, a separate treatment. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Big Bear Gold Corp. Completes Shares for Debt Settlements
data.description: Announced on April 22, 2026 in Vancouver, BC, Canada, Big Bear Gold Corp. (TSXV: BEAR) revealed the issuance of 2,476,189 common shares at $0.105 per share, totaling $260,000, to settle a debt as detailed in their February 19, 2026 release.

data.title: BridgeBio Pharma Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 18, 2026, BridgeBio Pharma, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Palo Alto, California, approved equity grants for 33 new employees. The compensation committee of the company's board of directors authorized the grants in restricted stock units, totaling 67,247 shares of BridgeBio's common stock. Each employee will have one-fourth of their shares vest on May 16, 2027, with the rest vesting on a quarterly basis thereafter. The vesting is contingent on the employees remaining employed with BridgeBio or its subsidiaries. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BBIO.

data.title: Ranpak to Hold Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Concord Township, Ohio - Ranpak has announced a scheduled conference call to address the financial performance of the company for the first quarter of 2026. The call will provide insight into key numbers and data related to Ranpak's performance during this period. This event signifies the company's commitment to transparency and communication with stakeholders.
